mec.name: Meat Intel
mec.tagline: Buy at the right moment. Wait when you should.

dashboard.headline: Meat market overview
dashboard.subline: Live FOB prices across origins, freight signals, the latest crisis feed and your active verdict.
dashboard.currentPricesSub: USD per kg from each origin, with the SAR equivalent and week-over-week change.
dashboard.verdictSub: Sweet-timing call based on price bands, crisis state and freight.
dashboard.freightSub: Container rates and transit days into Jeddah and Dammam.
dashboard.noVerdict: Pick a meat and cut from the dashboard to see today's verdict.

request.headline: Request a report
request.subline: Pick meat, cut, origins and destination — the agent runs the comparison and produces a bilingual PDF.
request.errorPick: Choose at least one country and a meat + cut.

priceExplorer.headline: Price explorer
priceExplorer.subline: 90-day USD/kg history for any cut from any origin, with the price band overlaid.
priceExplorer.noData: No price history for this combination yet.

crisis.headline: Crisis & alerts
crisis.subline: Everything our agents picked up that could move the market — newest first.

myReports.headline: My reports
myReports.subline: Every report you've requested, web and WhatsApp, with verdict and PDF.
myReports.empty: You haven't requested a report yet.

admin.headline: Sources & scrapers
admin.subline: Manage the data sources your reports are built from. Toggle active, trigger manual scrapes, watch health.
admin.adminToggleHelp: Enables Sources management. Demo-only — no real permissions.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp notifications
whatsapp.body: When a report finishes, also send the bilingual summary to your WhatsApp number.
whatsapp.label: WhatsApp number
whatsapp.saved: Saved · we'll also notify your WhatsApp.

verdicts.BUY_NOW_desc: Today is the cheapest window we've seen in 90 days.
verdicts.BUY_THIS_WEEK_desc: Below the 90-day median. Strong window to commit.
verdicts.NEUTRAL_desc: Around the median. No clear advantage either way.
verdicts.WAIT_4_8_desc: Above the median. Expect a better window in 4–8 weeks.
verdicts.WAIT_CRISIS_desc: Active supply crisis. Hold and watch the feed.

assistant.name: Jarvis
assistant.placeholder: Ask about your operations, Meat Intel, or settings…
assistant.scopeNote: I keep to business operations, Meat Intel, and portal settings.

notifications.headline: Notifications
notifications.subline: Everything that needs your attention, grouped and filterable. Mark as read once you've acted.
notifications.empty: Nothing here. You're all caught up.

login.headline: Welcome back
login.subline: Sign in to your operations workspace and review what Jarvis is running across your departments.
login.demoHelper: Demo environment · any email and password will work.
login.errorRequired: Please enter your email and password.

control.headline: Operations overview
control.subline: A single, calm view of every Jarvis module running across your company today.
control.deptHeatSub: Status at a glance · select one to dive in.
control.executionLogSub: What Jarvis has been doing across departments.

depts.indexSubline: Eleven departments running on autonomous operational architecture. Open one to see what's live.

solution.decisionsSub: Recent autonomous decisions made by this module.
solution.interventionsSub: Items the module flagged for a human review.
solution.workflowSub: Data sources, the Jarvis agent, integrations and outputs.
solution.actionApplied: Done · recorded in this demo workspace.

academy.headline: Train your team alongside the system
academy.subline: Short, practical modules that help your people work confidently with Jarvis.
academy.comingSoon: Module preview isn't available in this demo build. Your Jarvis engineer can enable it for you.

savings.headline: Total savings, line by line.
savings.subline: Every Saudi riyal the JARVIS operating layer has freed up this year — and what it would have cost without it.
savings.comparisonSub: Operating cost baseline against the same operations running through JARVIS.
savings.deptBreakdownSub: Where the savings actually land. Sorted by year-to-date impact.
savings.categoriesSub: Six structural levers the JARVIS operating layer pulls.
savings.trendSub: Last six months of realized savings.
savings.methodologyBody: Each amount is the difference between the pre-JARVIS operating cost baseline and the realized cost of the same operations running through JARVIS, validated against finance month-end close. Demo numbers — illustrative only.

contact.headline: Request an operational review
contact.subline: Send a note to the Jarvis engineer assigned to your deployment.
contact.name: Your name
contact.success: Got it. Your Jarvis engineer will reply within one business day.
contact.demoHelper: Demo environment · this form doesn't actually send.
